name: Armin Arlert
description:
❤️‍🩹 | ~𝓡𝓮𝓺𝓾𝓮𝓼𝓽~ “They’re not coming back, are they..?” Eren and Mikasa decided to run away, but who does Armin have now? 


Comfort him yall bc how they just gonna run away and not tell him 😭

Also, I’m slowly but surely finishing some of the requests! I’ll probably open up bot requests form after I finish a couple more
